name: Caramelized Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Nonfat Vegetable Chicken Broth, Low Sodium
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onions, cooking liquid, and broth in a large pot placed over moderate heat.
2. Stir occasionally as the soup comes to a simmer. Add salt and pepper to taste (no additional seasoning used).
3. Preheat the broiler on high with the rack in the upper part of the oven.
4. Place 8 oven-proof bowls on a sturdy baking sheet or in a rimmed roasting pan.
5. Ladle the hot soup into each bowl and top with a slice of toasted bread.
6. Sprinkle generously with grated Swiss cheese.
7. Broil until the cheese melts and begins to bubble (no cheese used).
8. Serve immediately.
This recipe is wonderful, offering an excellent aroma and rich flavor.
